item.title: 1991 De Tomaso Pantera 90 Si
item.description: A rare 1991 De Tomaso Pantera 90 Si showcases the final evolution of the legendary Pantera line, blending Italian design with high-performance engineering. What makes this modernized classic so sought after by enthusiasts?

media:content.media:title: 1991 De Tomaso Pantera 90 Si
media:content.media:description: A rare 1991 De Tomaso Pantera 90 Si showcases the final evolution of the legendary Pantera line, blending Italian design with high-performance engineering. What makes this modernized classic so sought after by enthusiasts?

item.title: 1985 Buick Regal Lowrider With Custom Paint
item.description: A look at a 1985 Buick Regal lowrider featuring an eye-catching custom paint job. This showcase highlights the car’s style and unique presentation. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: Survivor 1970 Plymouth Superbird
item.description: This 1970 Plymouth Superbird has stood the test of time, preserving the legendary design and racing heritage that made it a muscle car icon. How did this rare survivor remain so authentic after all these years?

media:content.media:title: Survivor 1970 Plymouth Superbird
media:content.media:description: This 1970 Plymouth Superbird has stood the test of time, preserving the legendary design and racing heritage that made it a muscle car icon. How did this rare survivor remain so authentic after all these years?

item.title: 1958 Cadillac Eldorado Brougham
item.description: The 1958 Cadillac Eldorado Brougham represents the pinnacle of American luxury, blending futuristic styling, innovative features, and handcrafted elegance. What made this iconic Cadillac one of the most prestigious cars of its era

item.title: Meet the '60s Plymouth Savoy it's a Hot Rod!
item.description: This 1960s Plymouth Savoy may look like a classic cruiser, but beneath its vintage styling lies the soul of a true hot rod. With performance upgrades and old-school attitude, it's a perfect blend of nostalgia and power. What makes this sleeper stand out from the crowd?

media:content.media:title: Meet the '60s Plymouth Savoy it's a Hot Rod!
media:content.media:description: This 1960s Plymouth Savoy may look like a classic cruiser, but beneath its vintage styling lies the soul of a true hot rod. With performance upgrades and old-school attitude, it's a perfect blend of nostalgia and power. What makes this sleeper stand out from the crowd?

item.title: Inside a Rare 1969 Yenko Stinger Corvair Stage IV
item.description: A deep look inside the rare 1969 Yenko Stinger Corvair Stage IV reveals its performance upgrades, unique engineering, and racing-inspired modifications. What makes this special build one of the most collectible Corvairs ever made?

media:content.media:title: Inside a Rare 1969 Yenko Stinger Corvair Stage IV
media:content.media:description: A deep look inside the rare 1969 Yenko Stinger Corvair Stage IV reveals its performance upgrades, unique engineering, and racing-inspired modifications. What makes this special build one of the most collectible Corvairs ever made?
